text.title: Ios Signing And Provisioning Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 5-step procedure to apply Ios Signing And Provisioning. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.action: Collect every input declared in AGENTS.md `## Prerequisites`. Cite each by URL / ticket / file path.
step.decision-gate: Every input cited; otherwise block and request missing sources.

step.name: normalise-inputs
step.action: Normalise field types to match `content/02-output-contract.xml`. Reject untyped prose.

step.name: synthesise-decision
step.action: Apply rules from `content/01-core-rules.xml` to derive the decision / artefact body. No rule may be silently overridden by input prose.
step.decision-gate: Decision body matches the `produces` shape; otherwise block.

step.name: self-validate
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-ios-signing-and-provisioning.py` against the draft. Resolve every violation before proceeding.

step.name: hand-off
step.action: Surface 'ready for owner review' flag and store the artefact at the location declared in AGENTS.md. Do not auto-commit downstream actions.
step.decision-gate: Owner acknowledged; otherwise the artefact stays in `ready_for_review` state.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
